name: acme-salary-management
description: Employee salary management software for an HR Manager (Incubyte take-home)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @acme/api" "npm run dev --workspace @acme/web"
scripts.build:prod: npm run build --workspace @acme/api && npm run build:web:prod && npm run stage:web
